productName: Mack's GAK ( I ) - Plaid Jacket BHO Cured Resin Cart 1g
description: A grab-and-go hybrid disposable of Mack's Gak, the simplest way to vape: flavorful, portable, and zero setup required. Grab-and-go convenience, a sweet, citrus-earthy, creamy aroma with a balanced, euphoric feel, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
